title: Rich Yeasty Egyptian Comte Flatbread
description: A crumbly and flavorful Egyptian flatbread featuring Comte cheese, perfect for a satisfying snack or light meal. This dish is high in protein and features a yeasty flavor profile.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a thin circle.
Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with grated Comte cheese.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until it is golden brown.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired.
Let the flatbread cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
